DCS_export.description: Process control data (headbox pressure, approach flow, fan pump, white water consistency, retention aid, slice opening, machine speed, stock temp, jet/wire ratio, vacuum pumps)

QCS_quality_export.description: Quality control data (CD basis weight CV, formation index, ash content, moisture, strength, defect grade)

notable_observations: 70.9% of production is defect B or C - significant quality issue
Moisture is essentially constant at 3.0 (tightly controlled or sensor issue)
619 grade changes in 3 months - very frequent cycling
Vacuum pump 2 has extreme range (-166.9 to 404.6 kPa) suggesting sensor anomaly or transient
